zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat於大約1550年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾時，她的父親James Dunbar 2nd of Tarbat16歲，母親Marjorie Ogilvie19歲。她和Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1612年3月22日享年63歲。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat was born about 1550, in Ross-shire, Scotland, her father, James Dunbar 2nd of Tarbat, was 16 and her mother, Marjorie Ogilvie, was 19. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt. She died on 22 March 1612, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat est née environ 1550, à Ross-shire, Écosse, son père, James Dunbar 2nd of Tarbat, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Marjorie Ogilvie, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt. Elle est décédée le 22 mars 1612, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.Inveran, Ross Cromarty, Scotland: Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat um 1550 in Ross-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Dunbar 2nd of Tarbat 16 und ihre Mutter Marjorie Ogilvie 19. Sie hatte mit Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. März 1612 im Alter von 63 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat è nata il circa 1550 nel Ross-shire, Scotland, sua padre, James Dunbar 2nd of Tarbat, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Marjorie Ogilvie, aveva 19 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt. Morì il 22 marzo 1612, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbatが約1550年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアで生まれた時，父James Dunbar 2nd of Tarbatは16歳，母Marjorie Ogilvieは19歳であった。彼女はMajor Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assyntとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1612年3月22日に63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat(이)가 대략 1550년 스컷랜드 로스-실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Dunbar 2nd of Tarbat(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marjorie Ogilvie(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1612년 3월 22일 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat родилась около 1550 г. в местности росс-шир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени James Dunbar 2nd of Tarbat было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjorie Ogilvie, 19. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt. Она умерла 22 марта 1612 г. в возрасте 63 лет.
